transcript: Alright, don't give up on me. The last thing we need to do is win the ball, because there's a good chance my team could fall out of the game. Team, I'll bet this is our dream to win. You're up, Jackie. Three, higher, higher, higher, higher, higher. You guys take it, let's go. Dalbert's team won the challenge. Let's go. And in my mind, I'm making sure that no matter who is chosen to sit out, that it will not affect that weight for me. We have to take one person to...

The last thing we need to do is win the ball, because there's a good chance my team could fall out of the game.
Team, I'll bet this is our dream to win.

You guys take it, let's go.
And in my mind, I'm making sure that no matter who is chosen to sit out, that it will not affect that weight for me.
